package rulefixtures

// scenario for duplicate_struct_tag_key: Struct field tags that repeat the same key more than once.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: consistency; severity: contextual.
type Rule229NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario229Negative(records []Rule229NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
